name: test_trav_51_platita_partial_op
description:
Test Case TRAV-51 : Platita partial - OP

    Summary:
    Verifica incasarea pentru facturile platite partial si rezervarea anulata,
    fara bifa "Anuleaza fara penalizare"
descriptionHtml:
Test Case TRAV-51 : Platita partial - OP

Summary:
Verifica incasarea pentru facturile platite partial si rezervarea anulata,
fara bifa "Anuleaza fara penalizare"
statusMessage: AssertionError: Data anularii nu este corecta. Expected: 2026-06-10 06:09:19, UI: 2026-06-10 09:09:22
statusTrace:
browser = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver (session="e3df3ca4b925183ad3bf43d1ef4aee69")>
config = <tests.environment_config.StagingConfig object at 0x7f790bad6390>

    @pytest.mark.staging
    def test_trav_51_platita_partial_op(browser, config):
        """
        Test Case TRAV-51 : Platita partial - OP
    
        Summary:
        Verifica incasarea pentru facturile platite partial si rezervarea anulata,
        fara bifa "Anuleaza fara penalizare"
        """
        search_hotel = SearchHotelPage(browser)
        add_customer = AddCustomer(browser)
        add_tourists = AddTourists(browser)
        search_reservation_page = SearchReservationPage(browser)
        invoice_page = InvoicePage(browser)
        handle_reservation = HandleReservation(browser)
        details_reservation = DetailsReservation(browser)
        cancel_reservation_modal = CancelReservationModal(browser)
        generate_date = GenerateData(browser)
    
        main_window = browser.current_window_handle
    
        # =========================================================================
        # STEP 1
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Action:
        #   Adauga o rezervare si plateste PARTIAL rezervarea (Avans 20%) prin OP
        # =========================================================================
        search_hotel.allotment_reservation(config)
        add_customer.add_customer(VALID_EMAIL)
        add_tourists.configure_and_save_installment_plan(rates_count=2, first_rate_percent=20)
    
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Expected Results:
        #   - Rezervarea este adaugata -> Statusul este CF (Confirmata)
        #   - Dupa plata partiala Statusul se schimba in PA (Partial platita)
        # =========================================================================
        search_reservation_page.check_reservation_for_displayed_reservation(ReservationStatues.CF.value)
        search_reservation_page.pay_first_reservation_term_with_voucher()
        search_reservation_page.check_reservation_for_displayed_reservation(ReservationStatues.PA.value)
        reservation_id = search_reservation_page.return_reservation_id()
    
        search_reservation_page.open_invoice_in_new_tab()
        browser.close()
        browser.switch_to.window(main_window)
        browser.refresh()
        incasat_value = search_reservation_page.return_incasat_value()
    
        # =========================================================================
        # STEP 2
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Action:
        #   Verifica ca Rezervarea are o incasare
        # =========================================================================
        search_reservation_page.open_invoice_in_new_tab()
    
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Expected Results:
        #   - In Facturi apare factura platita partial
        # =========================================================================
        invoice_page.count_number_of_invoices(1)
        invoice_value = invoice_page.return_valoare_for_specific_invoice_number(1)
        assert incasat_value in invoice_value, f"Pretul de pe factura nu se regaseste in incasare!"
    
        # =========================================================================
        # STEP 3
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Action:
        #   Mergi pe Detalii Rezervare si click pe Anuleaza rezervare. Sterge email
        #   hotel, adauga motivul anularii, debifeaza optiunea de "Anuleaza fara
        #   penalizare" si click pe Anuleaza.
        # =========================================================================
        browser.close()
        browser.switch_to.window(main_window)
    
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details()
        WebDriverWait(browser, 10).until(EC.number_of_windows_to_be(2))
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[-1])
    
        details_reservation.cancel_reservation()
        data_and_time_expected = generate_date.get_current_datetime_YYYY_MM_DD_HH_MM_SS()
        cancel_reservation_modal.fill_and_submit_cancellation(VALID_EMAIL, CancelReservationReason.TEST.value)
    
        browser.switch_to.window(main_window)
        browser.refresh()
    
        # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        # Expected Results:
        #   - Statusul rezervarii devine AN (Anulata)
        #   - La detalii rezervare apare Anulata cu info: Anulata la data, motiv, user
        # =========================================================================
        search_reservation_page.check_reservation_for_displayed_reservation(ReservationStatues.AN.value)
    
        handle_reservation.open_reservation_details()
        WebDriverWait(browser, 10).until(EC.number_of_windows_to_be(2))
        browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[-1])
    
        # -> MASCARE COMPLETĂ: Calculele și textele hardcoded s-au mutat în metode dedicate din pagină
>       details_reservation.verify_cancellation_timestamp(data_and_time_expected)

tests/scripts/achita_rezervare/rezervari_anulate/fara_bifa_anuleaza_fara_penalizare/trav_51_platita_partial_op_test.py:114: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

self = <pages.modal_details_reservation.DetailsReservation object at 0x7f790bb19550>
expected_time_str = '2026-06-10 06:09:19', max_diff_seconds = 10

    def verify_cancellation_timestamp(self, expected_time_str, max_diff_seconds=10):
        """Extrage timpul din UI și verifică dacă se încadrează în delta permisă."""
        reservation_details_text = self.get_reservation_details_text()
        ui_datetime = self.extract_datetime_from_text(reservation_details_text)
        expected_datetime = datetime.strptime(expected_time_str, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    
>       assert abs((ui_datetime - expected_datetime).total_seconds()) <= max_diff_seconds, (
            f"Data anularii nu este corecta. Expected: {expected_datetime}, UI: {ui_datetime}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Data anularii nu este corecta. Expected: 2026-06-10 06:09:19, UI: 2026-06-10 09:09:22
